1970లో రికార్డ్ చేయబడిన అత్యధిక సగటు బియ్యం దిగుబడిని కలిగి ఉన్న చత్తీస్గఢ్లోని టాప్ 5 జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT d.dist_name, AVG(fcma.rice_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_rice_yield
FROM fact_cereals_major fcma
JOIN dim_year dy ON fcma.year_id = dy.year_id
JOIN dim_geography d ON fcma.geography_id = d.geography_id
WHERE dy.year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1979
  AND d.state_name = 'Chhattisgarh'
GROUP BY d.dist_name
ORDER BY avg_rice_yield DESC

AND fcm.MAIZE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0

    dg.STATE_NAME,
